name: Frozen Strawberry Meringue Torte
recipeIngredient: 3 cups whole fresh or frozen strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs, sugar, butter, and pecans in a bowl.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 10-inch spring form pan.
3. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
4. Cool completely.
5. Slice strawberries to make 2 cups (save the rest for garnish).
6. In a large electric mixer bowl, combine sliced berries, sugar, egg whites, lemon juice, vanilla, and salt.
7. Beat on low speed until blended, then increase to high speed and beat until stiff peaks form (about 15 minutes).
8. In another bowl, beat cream until soft peaks form, then fold in the berry meringue mixture.
9. Pour into the cooled crust.
10. Cover and freeze for at least 12 hours until very firm.
11. To serve, remove from the spring form pan.
12. Arrange about 7 halved berries around the edge.
13. Cut into wedges and serve immediately.
14. Pass a bowl of sliced berries to add on top of servings.
